sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: MCD 2026년 1분기 순이익 전년비 6% 성장, EPS 2.78달러 기록

keyPoints.text: 2026년 1분기 총매출 65억 1,700만 달러(전년 59억 5,600만 달러), 순이익 19억 8,300만 달러로 전년 대비 6% 성장(환율 중립 기준 +1%)
희석 EPS 2.78달러(+7%), 유로 강세 등 환율 효과가 EPS에 0.13달러 긍정적으로 기여
Accelerating the Organization 구조조정 비용 세전 4,700만 달러 반영(전년 동기 6,600만 달러), 2027년 완료 예정

riskChanges.text: 글로벌 비즈니스 서비스 전환 과정에서 구조조정 비용이 2027년까지 분기별로 지속 발생할 전망

businessChanges.text: Accelerating the Arches 전략 고도화 일환으로 운영 모델 현대화 및 글로벌 비즈니스 서비스 전략 추진 중

financialHighlights.text: 분기 순이익 19억 8,300만 달러, 전년 대비 +6%(환율 중립 기준 +1%)
희석 EPS 2.78달러(+7%), 환율 효과 0.13달러 긍정적 기여 포함
구조조정 관련 세전 비용 4,700만 달러(전년 동기 6,600만 달러) 계상

watchItems.text: Accelerating the Organization 구조조정은 2027년 완료 목표로 임직원 조기 퇴직, 임차 계약 해지, 전문 서비스 비용 등 지속 발생 예정

evidence.sourceTextDigest: ch are aimed at elevating the Company’s performance. Accelerating the Organization is designed to unlock further growth as the Company focuses on becoming faster, more innovative and more efficient for its customers and people. As the Company furthers its operating model and technology transformation, primarily through its Global Business Services strategy, under Accelerating the Organization, it will continue to incur various restructuring charges through its anticipated completion during 2027. These restructuring charges may include employee termination benefits, costs to terminate contracts, including lease terminations, and professional services and other costs. Impact of Foreign Currency Translation The impact of foreign currency translation on consolidated operating results for the quarter primarily reflected the strengthening of most major currencies against the U.S. Dollar, prima

rily driven by the Euro. While changes in foreign currency exchange rates affect reported results, McDonald's mitigates exposures, where practical, by purchasing goods and services in local currencies, financing in local currencies and hedging certain foreign-denominated cash flows. Results excluding the effect of foreign currency translation (referred to as constant currency) are calculated by translating current year results at prior year average exchange rates. 13 1 Net Income and Diluted Earnings per Share Net income increased 6% (1% in constant currencies) to $1,983 million, and diluted earnings per share increased 7% (2% in constant currencies) to $2.78. Foreign currency translation had a positive impact of $0.13 on diluted earnings per share. Results included pre-tax charges of $47 million, or $0.05 per share, for the three months ended March 31, 2026 and $66 million, or $0.07 per share, for the three months ended March 31, 2025, primarily related to restructuring charges associated with the Company's internal effort to modernize ways of working ( Accelerating the Organization).
